# Xenovoya

A cooperative on-chain hex exploration game about voyaging into fog, sharing discoveries, and escaping together.

## Core Pages

- [Xenovoya](https://xenovoya.luckymachines.com): Play Xenovoya, a cooperative on-chain hex exploration game about voyaging into fog, sharing discoveries, and escaping together.
- [Play Xenovoya](https://play.xenovoya.com): Launch the live Xenovoya expedition client.

## Scenario Pages

- Public scenario pages are not published from this build.

## Discovery Topics

- Public discovery topic pages are not published from this build.
